channel.title: Blanc Browser Changelog
channel.description: New features, fixes, and platform updates in Blanc Browser.

item.title: Blanc 0.17.0
item.description: Add /save [folder] slash command Network privacy (M2+M3): WebRTC leak protection + encrypted DNS Network privacy (v0.17.0) This release adds WebRTC leak protection and optional encrypted DNS (DoH). Encrypted DNS hides your DNS lookups from the network *in transit* to the resolver you choose — it does not hide the sites you visit (destination IPs remain visible to your network), and choosing a provider is a trust decision. Automatic mode upgrades opportunistically and can fall back to unencrypted DNS; only the named-provider and custom positions are strict. ---

item.title: Blanc 0.16.0
item.description: Import favorites from other browsers + favorites folders Reflect favorites folders in the native Favorites menu

item.title: Blanc 0.15.5
item.description: fix(webauthn): Touch ID passkeys — entitlement, provisioning profile, verified signing chain

item.title: Blanc 0.15.4
item.description: fix(pages): private new tabs open blank — register blanc:// on the private session

item.title: Blanc 0.15.3
item.description: fix(webauthn): restore Touch ID passkeys without restricted entitlement fix(security): harden desktop browser boundaries fix(privacy): audit follow-ups — telemetry pipeline, sync wipe, negative security tests

item.title: Blanc 0.15.1
item.description: fix(build): Gatekeeper rejection on fresh installs + Intel Mac support

item.title: Blanc 0.15.0
item.description: feat: add macOS Touch ID passkeys fix(release): guard all packaging inputs iOS M6: theming, settings-lite, session restore, TestFlight prep feat(site): marketing site release 1 — features, download, mobile optimization

item.title: Blanc 0.14.0
item.description: test: add YouTube ad-blocking filter-list regression tests ci: fix substrate job failing on the adblock-youtube unit test Move new tab / private launchers into a dedicated island panel footer feat(adblock): support $domain= in the WKContentRuleList converter build(adblock): add --check drift guard for the generated blocklist Island chrome: monochrome palette, favicon fix, and pill polish fix(ios): hold ContentBlocker pending targets weakly, drop on failure

item.title: Blanc 0.13.3
item.description: iOS port: roadmap, M0-M1 walking skeleton, M2 design

item.title: Blanc 0.13.2
item.description: Fix Google sign-in "browser may not be secure" by matching Chrome browser signals

item.title: Blanc 0.13.1
item.description: Patch Sec-CH-UA client hints to include Chrome brand

item.title: Blanc 0.13.0
item.description: Add cross-platform parity spec, acceptance tests, and substrate generators Document parity infrastructure in CLAUDE.md; guard settings:check against unguarded keys Harden ping worker against transient KV failures; enable Workers Logs Add active-user metrics to the launch ping

item.title: Blanc 0.12.0
item.description: Ship end-to-end encrypted profile sync (v1: Favorites + settings)

item.title: Blanc 0.11.0
item.description: Fix 15 code-review findings from the Supporter/monetization work

item.title: Blanc 0.10.0
item.description: Arrow-key workspace navigation + Help menu with Keyboard Shortcuts page Monetization phase 1: Blanc Supporter license, support rails, grant drafts

item.title: Blanc 0.9.7
item.description: Add Windows and Linux release builds via CI workflow Fix Windows/Linux release workflow: real filenames, cert-profile gate Drop nonexistent .blockmap from the Linux AppImage asset list Document tonight's Windows/Linux release gotchas in CLAUDE.md

item.title: Blanc 0.9.5
item.description: Expand native Tabs/Favorites menus: pin, mute, duplicate tab
